init.title: General options
init.description: Configure the general behavior of the update campaign.

data_description.timeout: Maximum time, in seconds, to wait for an update to complete before marking it as failed.
data_description.max_items: Limits how many devices are processed in one batch. Mainly useful for testing. For final use, set a high value or remove this logic later.
data_description.throttle: Automatically adjusts the delay between updates based on server load.

throttle.title: Throttling options
throttle.description: Choose which sensors are used to measure server load and define the minimum/maximum delays between two updates.

data_description.cpu_sensor: Sensor representing CPU usage in percent.
data_description.temp_sensor: Sensor representing CPU temperature, ideally in °C.
data_description.load_sensor: Sensor representing system load, for example 1-minute load.
data_description.delay_min: Minimum delay, in seconds, between two updates when load is low.
data_description.delay_max: Maximum delay, in seconds, between two updates when load is high.
